caption:
Every missed call has a price tag.

Multiply three numbers: missed calls this month, your close rate, your average job value. That number is revenue that walked out the door before anyone noticed.

Pull your real count. Check your phone system or CRM for missed and unanswered calls in the last 30 days. Most owners never pull this number.

The fix runs automatically. A text fires the instant a call goes unanswered, before the caller dials the next name on their list.

DM "RECOVER" to get missed-call recovery running in your business this week.

#ServiceBusiness #HomeServices #SmallBusinessMarketing #LeadGeneration #ContractorTips
rationale: Missed-call math is unclaimed territory for this account, and the two-message text-back script gives followers something to run today instead of a vague productivity tip. The formula makes the loss personal before the fix ever gets pitched.
